mood: quietly alive, deliberate, archival, luminous, more botanical installation than software interface
lighting: pre-dawn conservatory light filtered through fogged glass, with warm brass edge highlights and soft internal green-white memory glow
object_inventory: towering translucent user-profile monolith etched with layered preference strata
overhead background-extraction canopy woven from luminous rootlike threads
basalt GitHub seed vault with an embossed LangMem repository seal
brass hot-path gate with hand-sized memory tool glyphs
three-panel stained-glass core-concepts window showing semantic, episodic, and procedural memory
delayed-processing water clock dripping into small ceramic basins
belt of silver memory instruments hanging from a curved rail
procedural prompt kiln with glowing rewritten instruction tablets
namespace terrarium shelves containing labeled miniature ecosystems
conservative-deletion pruning shears locked inside a glass case
negative_constraints: no floating browser chrome dominating the image
every source artifact must be a tangible visible object in the scene
